cases.prompt: My Octane dashboard controller runs four count queries sequentially — how do I run them in parallel?
cases.expect: references concurrency-and-tasks.md: Octane::concurrently([...fns]) returning destructured results

cases.prompt: Users report seeing each other's data since I enabled Octane — what's wrong with my service binding?
cases.expect: references memory-safety-and-config.md: singleton holding user state -> switch to scoped binding

cases.prompt: How do I choose between Swoole, RoadRunner, and FrankenPHP and configure workers for production?
cases.expect: references setup-and-servers.md: server trade-offs, octane:install --server, swoole max_request + supervisor
